Recipient: Monsieur le Directeur, Special Section Public Security Department, Ministère des Travaux Publics, Le Caire
Brief_Summary: The Director General of the Egyptian Antiquities Service transmits the passport of M. Alexandre Emile Baraize, Director of Works, to the Director of the Public Security Department, requesting a visa as per a circular from M.C.F. Rider, a copy of which was sent by the Ministry of Public Works.
English_Translation:
[Handwritten Arabic: M. W. 12]

June 10, 1922

I.4/2

Passport Visa.

R.D.

Sir,

I have the honor to transmit herewith the passport of Mr. Alexandre Emile Baraize, Director of Works in our Service, and to ask you to kindly affix the visa which is the subject of the circular from Mr. C.F. Rider, a copy of which the Ministry of Public Works sent us on March 18th last.

Please accept, Sir, the expression of my most distinguished sentiments.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,

The Director
Special Section Public Security Department
Ministry of Public Works, Cairo
Full_Transcription:
[Handwritten Arabic: م. و. 12]

10 Juin 1922

I.4/2

Visa de passeports.

R.D.

Monsieur le Directeur,

J'ai l'honneur de vous transmettre ci-
joint le passeport de M. Alexandre Emile Baraize,
directeur de travaux en notre Service, et de vous
prier de vouloir bien y apposer le visa faisant l'ob-
jet de la circulaire de M.C.F. Rider, dont le Minis-
tère des Travaux Publics nous a envoyé copie le 18
Mars dernier.
Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur,
l'expression de mes sentiments très distingués.

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,

Monsieur le Directeur
Special Section Public Security Department
Ministère des Travaux Publics, Le Caire
---------
